nasb.text: Then he said, “Please do not leave us, inasmuch as you know where we should camp in the wilderness, and you will be as eyes for us.

esv.text: And he said, “Please do not leave us, for you know where we should camp in the wilderness, and you will serve as eyes for us.

cnv.text: 摩西說：“求你不要離開我們，因為你知道我們應怎樣在曠野安營，你可以作我們的眼目。

ccb.text: 摩西说：“请不要离开我们。你熟悉旷野，可以做我们的向导，告诉我们在哪里扎营。
